business_question: Which stores have the highest product return rates?
business_context: Store operations teams need to identify stores with abnormal return behavior.
sql_answer:
SELECT
    st.STORE_NAME,
    SUM(r.UNITS_RETURNED) AS RETURNED_UNITS,
    SUM(s.UNITS_SOLD) AS SOLD_UNITS,
    ROUND(
        SUM(r.UNITS_RETURNED) * 100.0 /
        NULLIF(SUM(s.UNITS_SOLD),0),2
    ) AS RETURN_RATE_PCT
FROM FACT_RETURNS r
JOIN FACT_SALES s
    ON r.STORE_KEY = s.STORE_KEY
JOIN DIM_STORE st
    ON st.STORE_KEY = r.STORE_KEY
GROUP BY st.STORE_NAME
ORDER BY RETURN_RATE_PCT DESC;
